Dune 4K Blu-ray

United States / Warner Bros. / 2021

4K UHD Blu-ray Edition

Release date: January 11, 2022

Video
Codec: HEVC / H.265
Resolution: 2160p
HDR: Dolby Vision, HDR10
Aspect ratio: 2.39:1

Audio
English: Dolby TrueHD with Dolby Atmos 7.1
English: Dolby Digital 5.1
English: Dolby Digital 2.0 (Descriptive Audio)
French: Dolby Digital 5.1
Spanish: Dolby Digital 5.1
German: Dolby Digital 5.1

Subtitles
English SDH, French, Spanish, German

Blu-ray Edition

Release date: January 11, 2022

Video
Codec: MPEG-4 AVC
Resolution: 1080p
Aspect ratio: 2.39:1

Audio
English: DTS-HD Master Audio 5.1
English: Dolby Digital 2.0 (Descriptive Audio)
French: Dolby Digital 5.1
Spanish: Dolby Digital 5.1

Subtitles
English SDH, French, Spanish

Overview

A mythic and emotionally charged hero's journey, "Dune" tells the story of Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, who must travel to the most dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people.
